Maclaer's Boots of Silence  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FEET
AC: 40
STR: +15 DEX: +25 STA: +15
SV FIRE: +10 SV DISEASE: +10 SV COLD: +10 SV MAGIC: +10 SV POISON: +10
WT: 1.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Maclaer's Boots of Silence
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FEET
AC: 40
STR: +15 DEX: +25 STA: +15
SV FIRE: +10 SV DISEASE: +10 SV COLD: +10 SV MAGIC: +10 SV POISON: +10
WT: 1.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Boots of the Chosen
Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Chain
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):50, 50, 50
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Vigilyn [Townebels]
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-11 08:55:54
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 58
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name
Vulak`Aerr


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan


Uploaded November 20th, 2022 by halfridge
Send a correction
Post Comment
I have em...
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2004 at 11:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758699625
11 posts
and I am VERY happy with them. Our guild has done the ring now 3 times... when these dropped I put my name in the hat. Not too many folks can claim to have Vulak loot. I for one am proud to equip them and I thank my guild for hard work it took to get em.

Runtiss Kneebreaker
Lord Protector
The Kindred

Once again with the nice AC stats and saves, but no hitpoints, as an SK, again ill wait for somthing better.
▲ Page top
Dex
QuoteReply
# Mar 11 2003 at 3:34 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965957890
17 posts
The 25 dex on these are very nice for a ranger not yet with 255 dex, or with AA even higher. Nice AC and other stats as well, shame it doesn't have raw hp though. Great for all classes listed, but being a ranger I see my needs for class better than others. Be nice to see these drop next time we kill Vulak.

#Anonymous, Posted: Dec 05 2001 at 2:59 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) u must be one of thos eppl who think look at me ima a big lv 30 and i cna kcik noobs all dya and it doesnt matter cuz i can tank as good as a warrior hahahahaha i luagh at you my friend the guy below is right this isnt no one itme if it was it would say rog period thast it

# Dec 23 2001 at 11:42 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361695875
69 posts
Maybe you should learn to speak properly and learn to type before you start trashing other people.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 20 2001 at 11:35 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ...Just putting in my few bits but +15str, +25dex = Rogue Item ^_^ I play a lvl 34 Cleric and a lvl 29 Rogue and dex is good for us helps my proc and me not getting hit as much...Dont say "rogues shouldnt use procing wepons it draws too much aggro", to that I say delete your account noob or learn to play a rogue I can out taunt 2 warriors around my same lvl easy without backstab and can ditch my aggro with just 2 buttons, what?? you cant count that high? im sorry you better stick to playing pong.
RE: <Grin>
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2002 at 1:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250520738
4 posts
Rogues don't really use procing weapons at this level. Backstabs cause enough aggro already and you never, ever, want aggro on a mob in NToV unless you're the main tank. You'll die quicker than you can even think to "ditch your aggro". Secondly, DEX has nothing to do with getting hit as much. That's AC.

Zyrrael
Human Warlord of Torvonnilous
▲ Page top
RE: <Grin>
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2003 at 8:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775832451
37 posts
Are you joking? Ntov mobs tickle. ^^

RE: <Grin>
QuoteReply
# Apr 06 2002 at 1:11 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1629678277437
Sage
150 posts
um ac is how much you get hit for AGI is how often you get hit.

QuoteReply
# Jan 27 2002 at 11:33 PM Rating: Decent

13 posts
L57 rogue here and I do use a procing weapon. I can manage my agro fine thanks. And yes I do go to ToV regularly.

Aggressive peeps
QuoteReply
# Oct 01 2001 at 6:24 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591766848380
26 posts
Ok, silence the violence, stop the insanity. First and foremost, it had to be expected someone would come tag this as a monk item (even though monks can't use it). It's a Vulak drop, not the hardest mob in the game exactly, but you do have to kill the hardest to get to him. That makes it the best item out there for the feet automatically. Any f00ls who say "Oh, this would be just perfect for my class!" is either making a poor attempt at being funny, or is truly and completely insane. Personally, I enjoy looking at these items and drooling over them, but I'd feel sorry for anyone I saw with it. That's a lot of time you could be spending with your wife/job/girlfriend/life. Whatever, I'm outta here.

# Sep 10 2001 at 6:12 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757996920

in nearly every post theres always someone who whines "oh my class cant wear this, Boo hoo waaaaaaaa" get over it!

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 27 2001 at 12:48 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) These are not available to Monks why? Weight 1.0, Str +15, Sta +15, Dex +25, AC +40. Oh no, these would suck for Monks. Another genius idea for other tanks, but never Monks.
RE: Monks?
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2002 at 12:40 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1595780119357
View User Forum
166 posts

Let me clear things up for the monks out there complaining about not being able to wear these boots. There is a completely simple reason you can't wear these boots. They are called "Maclaer's Boots of Silence", monks can't wear them because monks are way too noisey from all the whining and moaning they do about not being able to wear stuff like these boots.

Hope this clears things up. =)
▲ Page top
RE: Monks?
QuoteReply
# Aug 27 2001 at 2:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760131119
View User Forum
330 posts
just because it's low weight and has nice melee stats, that does not mean one should assume it aught to be a monk usable item as well. There is a reason it is not monk usable. Monks where never ment to have the best ac. This thing has HUGE ac. Much too good for a monk while keeping class balance even for a ToV drop. If it had 20 ac, then I don't know why it wouldn't be monk usable as well. 40 ac is too much, though.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 10 2001 at 11:37 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) It was inevitable. Every low-weight item some dumbass comes along and Tags i a monk item. Even if it isnt monk usable
this guy is hard

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 23 2001 at 10:32 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Are you a newb "Mr. There is no HP!"? If you know anything about what kind of damage anyone that can fight in ToV will be taking, the 100 or so HP that you'd get with some other gear isn't gonna help you much. On the other hand, the resists, and the +25 Dex are VERY nice, and +15 Str in boots... *drool*. STOP WHINING!
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 23 2001 at 10:10 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) The only problem with these boots is that they weight too much, and aren't monk useable...I mean geez, when are monks gonna get some good items?? Double all the stats and the ac, make em weight 0.0, and make em monk only, then they will be decent.
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 23 2001 at 10:51 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I'm sorry, but what do you mean they weight to much, maybe my eyes are going, but they weight is 1...

# Aug 24 2001 at 12:00 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591765794982
15 posts
umm, think for a second please, that 1 weight is not going to matter much with +15 str, also with all the other 0.0 weight items out there plus str increasing stats, most of the time you wont even reach your full carrying potential...Even with that said i would take these boots ANYDAY even if the had 20 weight.

Bolu Blackhand
